# Swap misplaced non-voter: 6 stores in 2 zones, constraint requires 2
# non-voters in zone=b. Currently only 1 non-voter is in zone=b. MMA should
# swap a non-voter from zone=a to zone=b.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=6 node-id=6 locality-tiers=zone=b
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3 constraints={'+zone=b':2}
----

repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] repair not yet implemented
pending(0)
